concept: Formulate a turn-based campaign where you guide a caravan of nomadic archivists preserving knowledge across a landscape where information physically deteriorates if it remains stationary. Strategically plan routes between isolated settlements to collect and distribute crucial information before it degrades beyond recovery. Defend your memory-keepers from knowledge pirates and entities that consume information to erase it from existence. Piece together fragments of an ancient encyclopedia that could explain why reality itself seems to be actively hostile toward permanent records of history.
